title: chrysanthemum alpinum f. cuneifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum alpinum f. cuneifolium, also known as the needle-leaved alpine chrysanthemum, is a variant of the alpine chrysanthemum plant, characterized by its distinctive needle-shaped leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in soothing digestive issues and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alpinum f. cuneifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
